prompt: Repair the versioned webhook processor so that each entity advances monotonically and independently when deliveries are out of order or duplicated. Retain future versions according to the existing bounded nearest-future policy; stale deliveries and duplicates of the current or a buffered version must not overwrite state. As soon as a gap closes, replay every consecutively numbered buffered event and report all versions applied by that call in order. Keep the existing public API and input validation intact. Do not modify the protected test. Run `node --experimental-strip-types test/webhookProcessor.test.ts` from the project root.
